case_title: CAPELA STEVE VS WILSON RAYMOND MICHAEL DBA AUSTIN WILSON ASSOC

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CAPELA STEVE AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON RAYMOND MICHAEL DBA AUSTIN WILSON ASSOC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-10-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 08
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILSON RAYMOND MICHAEL DBA AUSTIN WILSON ASSOC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPELA STEVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILSON RAYMOND MICHAEL DBA AUSTIN WILSON ASSOC CT GAVE PLTF UNTIL 10/16/91 TO SUBMIT ADDT'L EVIDENCE. COURT HAS NOT RECEIVED SUCH EVIDENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPELA STEVE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT WILSON RAYMOND MICHAEL DBA AUSTIN WILSON ASSOC PLTF FAILED TO ESTABLISH LIABILITY PUR CCP706.154 SUB(A) BECAUSE PLTF'S EVIDENCE FAILS TO DEMON- STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED
JUDGMENT CONT'D- DEMONSTRATE USE OF THE PROCEDURES AND FORMS PRESCRIBED BY CCP 706.108 AND CCP706.126 AND BY CA RULES OF COURT 	82.5(I)AND 982.5(2)
JUDGMENT CONT'D AS REQUIRED BY CCP 706.120 AND FAILS TO DEMONSTRATE SERVICE ON DEFT IN COM- PLIANCE WITH CCP 706.101
